title: Jamming
body:
![Jamming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2918eff11b170cc3bc06ea1f0233da3a9f186f2.png)

## Description
This mod includes a variety of audio-related features!

### Features:
- Chiseled Disc Rack: Similar to the Chiseled Bookshelf, but holds 10 Music Discs
- Disc Cutter: Craft Music Discs with the new [Empty Disc](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/wiki/Empty-Disc) item
- Music Discs: [51 Discs](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/wiki/Music-Discs) added, for each Minecraft in-game song
- Tuning Fork: Can be used to set a Note Block's pitch
- Personal Book Reader: Uses Minecraft's narrator function to read books aloud
- Personal Disc Player: Works as a portable Jukebox
- Musical Instruments: 16 instruments added, 1 for each Note Block instrument. Plays a different pitch depending on player's y-axis view

Craft a Disc Cutter and trade with the new Melophile Villager to get started! The Disc Cutter recipe is unlocked in the Recipe Book after picking up a piece of Flint.

Musical instrument textures by TheTrueDurgerKing, from the mod [Pitch Perfect](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pitch-perfect), used under the MIT license.

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
